overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban residential area. The scene features palm-lined streets with tram tracks, colorful low-rise buildings with American flag motifs, and distant neon-lit skyscrapers. The player explores a fortified building area, crosses an overgrown street, and continues through a sparsely populated residential zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with tram tracks and colorful facades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to tram tracks, approaching a colorful building with star-spangled upper facade

entered.detail: metal tram tracks running parallel to the sidewalk on the left side
tall palm trees lining both sides of the street
colorful two-story building with blue star-patterned upper section and red lower walls
utility poles and wires crisscrossing above the street
futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk next to tram tracks. Palm trees line the street while a distinctive red and blue building with American flag motifs appears on the left. The background features towering futuristic skyscrapers under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified building entrance with sandbag barriers and American flag

events.description: approaching the fortified building with American flag and sandbag barriers
passing an NPC sitting in a lounge chair outside the building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the fortified building and observing the surroundings including a sitting NPC and outdoor furniture

notable_agents.action: sitting in a lounge chair relaxing outside the fortified building

entered.detail: stacked green sandbags forming defensive barriers around the building entrance
large American flag hanging from the building porch
folding lounge chair with an NPC sitting in it
makeshift seating area with couch and pallet table
tall cylindrical billboard structure with colorful advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a fortified building entrance protected by sandbag barriers and decorated with American flags. An NPC lounges in a chair near a makeshift outdoor seating area with a couch and pallet table. The scene transitions from the open street to a more enclosed, sheltered space near the building entrance.

events.description: crossing the street from the fortified area to the overgrown residential zone
entering overgrown sidewalk with scattered vegetation and weeds

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street and entering the overgrown residential area with scattered vegetation

entered.detail: tall weeds and grass growing through cracks in the pavement and along the road edges
large green metal dumpsters with open lids
low-rise residential buildings with varied colorful facades

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the asphalt street away from the fortified building, leaving the sandbag barriers behind. The environment transitions to an overgrown residential area with weeds sprouting through the pavement. Green dumpsters appear on the left while the circular billboard becomes more prominent in the mid-distance.

events.description: passing pedestrians including a person with distinctive blue hair walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the overgrown sidewalk passing other pedestrians in the residential area

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera with blue hair, white cap, and green crop top
standing on the sidewalk wearing red pants and black vest

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the overgrown residential sidewalk, the camera passes multiple pedestrians including a distinctive figure with blue hair and a white cap walking toward the camera, and another NPC in red pants standing on the right. The green dumpsters recede into the distance on the left as the path continues toward the city center.

events.description: observing a pedestrian kicking an object in the open dirt area ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching an open dirt intersection and observing a pedestrian kicking an object

notable_agents.action: kicking an object in the open dirt area near the intersection

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and grass area at the intersection
road intersection with crossing paths ahead

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk opens into a wide dirt intersection area. The green dumpsters are left behind as the camera approaches an open space where a pedestrian is seen kicking an object. The path ahead leads toward a junction with more residential buildings and distant skyscrapers visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a polished urban street into a weathered, overgrown residential district. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beside tram tracks and palm trees, passing a red and blue building adorned with American flag motifs under a clear blue sky. As the camera approaches a fortified entrance protected by sandbag barriers and makeshift outdoor furniture, the open street narrows into a sheltered space before the view shifts back across the asphalt. The environment then transitions into a more neglected area where weeds sprout through the pavement and green dumpsters line the path, passing various pedestrians including a figure with blue hair and a white cap. Finally, the sidewalk opens into a wide dirt intersection where the residential clutter recedes, leaving a broad junction with distant skyscrapers visible on the horizon.
